description: Calculate the Weighted Average Lease Term (WALT) for a portfolio of NYC commercial leases in /home/ga/Documents/nyc_brooklyn_leases.xlsx. On the 'Lease Data' sheet, calculate the Rent Per SqFt (Annual Rent / Square Footage), the Remaining Months from January 1, 2026 to the Lease End date (ensuring a minimum value of 0 for expired leases), and the WALT Weight (Annual Rent * Remaining Months). Apply conditional formatting to highlight Remaining Months greater than 0 and less than or equal to 24 in red. Create a new sheet named 'Portfolio Summary' containing labeled calculations for Total Leased SqFt, Total Annual Rent, Average Rent PSF, Portfolio WALT (Months), and Portfolio WALT (Years). Format currency values appropriately and save the workbook.
